title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention · Language Clinic: Interaction Resource
summary: The agent concatenates messages into text, loses function-call identity, assumes previous_interaction_id preserves tools and system instruction, and cannot explain provider retention. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the interaction resource increment in typed Gemini interaction and state ledger. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
Keep unit and routine integration tests offline and reserve authorized live-provider smoke, compatibility, and quality runs for controlled gates.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-interaction-resource — Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-interaction-state-parts-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-interaction-state-parts-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_interaction_state_parts_3(interactions: int = 12, correlated_interactions: int = 12, part_types: int = 5, redeclared_configs: int = 12, ambiguous_state_links: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if interactions < 1 or correlated_interactions < 0:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-count"
    if correlated_interactions != interactions:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-correlation"
    if part_types < 3 or redeclared_configs != interactions:
        return False, part_types, "part-or-config-gap"
    if ambiguous_state_links > 0:
        return False, ambiguous_state_links, "state-ambiguity"
    assert correlated_interactions == interactions and ambiguous_state_links == 0
    return True, correlated_interactions, "typed-interaction-state"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Defend the Interaction Resource model · Theory Interaction Resource
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Interaction Resource: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory agent engineering team handles case 6432 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Defend the Interaction Resource model · Theory Interaction Resource.
steps.why: Retrieving Interaction Resource through the concrete typed Gemini interaction and state ledger case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
